features.name: full_reset_annotation_on_module
features.description: Code should include a FullResetAnnotation applied to a module target with async resetType

features.name: module_instantiated_by_multiple_parents
features.description: Code should include a module that is instantiated in multiple different parent modules
features.snippet:
module Baz:
  inst bar of Bar

module Foo:
  inst bar of Bar

features.name: reset_port_added_to_module_without_registers
features.description: Code should include a module that receives a reset port but contains no registers to connect it to
features.snippet:
module Bar:

public module Foo:
  input reset: AsyncReset
  inst bar of Bar
